# Tech Stack

## Languages
- TypeScript (primary)
- Python (agents)
- Rust (performance-critical)

## Frameworks
- React (frontend)
- FastAPI (backend)
- LiveKit (real-time)

## Databases
- PostgreSQL (primary)
- Redis (caching)

## Infrastructure
- Vercel (frontend hosting)
- Railway (backend services)
- Cloudflare (CDN)
